strategy: Team of 4: a hitter plus supports. Hit with Life or Balance (he takes +35% from both) and never into Ice (80% resist).
He opens with a Frozen Armor Absorb. Break it with Shatter or armor-piercing, not Steal Ward.
Do not Steal Ward his Frozen Armor. It makes him hit the caster with Brimstone Revenant for 100 Fire and take the Absorb back. Pierce and Shatter get around it.
Leave the Thundersnow Troll alive until your burst is ready. The moment all his minions die, he gives himself two fresh Frozen Armors.
He is stunable, so a stun can buy a setup round. Stack blades, Shatter the Absorb, then land one Life or Balance hit.
cheatNotes: He begins with a Frozen Armor Absorb shielding his health. Shatter or pierce it.
Killing all his minions makes him cast two more Frozen Armors on himself. Only clear the Troll when you are ready to kill him.
Steal Ward on his Frozen Armor backfires: he casts Brimstone Revenant on the caster for 100 Fire and takes the Absorb back.
Pierce and Shatter remove the Frozen Armor without triggering the Steal Ward punish.
